NetSparkleUpdater.​AssemblyAccessors.​AssemblyDiagnosticsAccessor
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAssemblyAccessor
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​AssemblyAccessors.​AssemblyDiagnosticsAccessor

An assembly accessor that uses to get information on the assembly with a given name.  AssemblyTitle is the same as AssemblyProduct with this assembly accessor.

Variables
_fileVersion
private string? _fileVersion
_productVersion
private string? _productVersion
_productName
private string? _productName
_companyName
private string? _companyName
_legalCopyright
private string? _legalCopyright
_fileDescription
private string? _fileDescription
Functions
AssemblyDiagnosticsAccessor
public AssemblyDiagnosticsAccessor(
string? 
assemblyPath
)

Create a new diagnostics accessor and parse the assembly's information using .  is used to get the full file path of the given assembly.

Parameter
assemblyPath
string?

the path to the assembly to read/access

Exceptions
FileNotFoundException

Thrown when the path to the assembly with the given name doesn't exist or null is sent to the constructor

Properties
FileVersionInfo
public FileVersionInfo FileVersionInfo {
get;
protected 
set
}

for this assembly accessor in case there's something you want to look at outside of the other shortcut properties that are the same as other  objects

AssemblyTitle
public string AssemblyTitle {
get
}

Title of the assembly, e.g. "My Best Product".  NOTE: Returns ProductName data, not Title data, due to limitations in Diagnostics accessor!

AssemblyVersion
public string AssemblyVersion {
get
}
AssemblyDescription
public string AssemblyDescription {
get
}

Gets the description

public string AssemblyProduct {
get
}
AssemblyCopyright
public string AssemblyCopyright {
get
